default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hypermode and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, team updates, and engagement feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hypermode considering pausing GrowthX engagement due to rapid internal changes; Marcel suggests exploring alternative work streams](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Content tone/focus needs adjustment: more developer-focused, less "AI hype", consistent terminology](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [New sales rep (Andrew) joining Hypermode team, likely to impact ICP definition and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [7 articles published on Hypermode's CMS; performance tracking beginning](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Mara Leighton: New Associate Director at GrowthX, background in journalism and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Matthew Panzarino: Chief Content Officer at GrowthX, former Editor-in-Chief at TechCrunch](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Hypermode Engagement Feedback

  - [Jessica (Hypermode): Requesting pause due to:](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [Rapid iterations on messaging/positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [New sales rep impacting ICP definition](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Difficulty keeping up with content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX):](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Cautions against pausing due to Hypermode's low domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Suggests flexibility (e.g., 3-month cycle vs. 12-month)](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [Highlights value of GrowthX team expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Updates and Strategy

  - [7 articles published on Hypermode's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Jessica's feedback on content:](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [Adjust tone: more optimistic, less "doom and gloom"](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [More developer-focused language](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Consistent, accurate terminology (e.g., avoid overemphasizing open-source models)](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [Align with core product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide more transparency on SEO strategy and keyword selection](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Incorporate Hypermode's customer conversation notes into content](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Content Performance and Reporting

  - [Initial performance reports shared](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide reporting templates for Hypermode's ops team](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Focusing on impressions, clicks, and CTR optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Planning to implement webhooks for traffic source tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

### Technical Access Issues

  - [Sadira experiencing problems accessing Hypermode's repository](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Jessica to publish approved content if access issues persist](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to schedule follow-up with Jessica and Kevin to discuss engagement options](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Jimmy to schedule time with Jessica to explain content strategy "black box"](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Mara to develop process for incorporating customer conversation insights into content](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Sadira to review updated content strategy with Jessica's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Jessica to review and add feedback on content strategy via email](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Jimmy to provide reporting templates for Hypermode's ops team](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Jessica to meet with Ryan regarding repository access for Sadira](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Jessica to publish approved content if access issues persist](https://fathom.video/share/Y8BnxWAPUFRctDs8cyPoPbqVRHhFsabL?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

action_items.description: Schedule meeting w/ Jessica to explain content process, keyword strategy, info sources
Work w/ Mara on process to convert customer convos into blog articles
Review updated content strategy; email feedback to Sadra
Finalize & share stripped-down report templates for ops person
Discuss repo access issue w/ Ryan for Sadra; update on new repo location
Publish approved content from Airtable; export as markdown if needed
